title: Tao Te Ching 32
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 32 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 32 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The Tao is forever nameless. Small as it is in its original simplicity, the world dare not claim it as subject.
